The '''Imperial Patrol Ship''' was a militarized variant of the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[Action IV transport]]. It saw service during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] as a support ship for remote [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] outposts, combining the twin roles of resupplying Imperial personnel and performing customs inspections.<ref name="Platt's Starport Guide" />

Although it could technically be considered a [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]], the Imperial Patrol Ship was lightly armed, with just a pair of anti-starfighter [[Laser/Legends|laser]] cannons, and two obsolescent [[Twin Ion Engine starfighter|T.I.E. starfighters]], earlier models than the standard [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN]]. Most patrol ship [[Captain/Legends|captains]] realized that their main defense was psychological: the threat of Imperial reprisals if they were attacked.<ref name="Platt's Starport Guide" />
